title: Engulfing Dynamic Lights
description: Adds dynamic lights (not really) support for Engulfing Darkness.
body:
Adds the ability to save yourself from the darkness by holding an illuminating object in hand.

This is implemented by adding tags to items:
- Items tagged with **edl:safe** give the Veiled effect when held in the hand. The effect disappears when in water. (Default: Torch, Soul Torch, Lava Bucket)
- Items tagged with **edl:water_safe** give the Veiled effect when held in the hand even in water. (Default: Lantern, Soul Lantern, Glowstone Block, Sea Lantern, End Rod, Beacon)

Items can be added via datapack.

Requires [Engulfing Darkness](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/engulfing-darkness)
